2606.30543.title: TRACE: Temporal Relationship-Aware Conversational Entrainment Detection in Dyadic Speech
2606.30543.paper_summary: With the proliferation of speech AI agents, understanding emotional entrainment in conversational interaction has become increasingly important. Emotional entrainment is shaped by social relationships and conversational context, influencing affective coordination over time. We introduce DyadEE, a dataset for emotional entrainment detection in dyadic speech interactions, containing both emotionally entrained conversations and synthetic interactions where entrainment is disrupted through partner swapping and emotion resynthesis. We further propose TRACE, a window-level framework that models dyadic interaction as ordered sequences of acoustic embeddings derived from emotion fine-tuned Whisper representations, treating each sample as an interaction trace rather than pooled utterances. Experimental results on DyadEE show that incorporating conversational context and relationship information improves emotional entrainment detection, with TRACE achieving the best accuracy of 97.01%.
2606.30543.paper_summary_zh: 隨著語音 AI 代理的普及，理解對話互動中的情感同步變得越來越重要。情感同步受到社交關係和對話背景的影響，隨著時間的推移影響情感協調。我們介紹 DyadEE，一個用於雙人語音互動中情感同步檢測的數據集，包含情感同步的對話和通過夥伴交換和情感重合成而中斷同步的合成互動。我們進一步提出 TRACE，一個窗口級框架，將雙人互動建模為從情感微調的 Whisper 表示中衍生的聲學嵌入的有序序列，將每個樣本視為互動痕跡，而不是合併的發話。對 DyadEE 的實驗結果顯示，納入對話背景和關係信息可以改善情感同步檢測，TRACE 的準確率達到最佳的 97.01%。
2606.30543.author: Sathvik Manikantan Napa Ugandhar et.al.
2606.30543.authors: Sathvik Manikantan Napa Ugandhar, Hao Zhang, Alison Gunzler, Yuzhe Wang, Thomas Thebaud, Georgi Tinchev, Venkatesh Ravichandran, Laureano Moro-Velázquez
